## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SEO progress, redirects, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Redirects are the top priority.** Israel is blocked on a technical task requiring Ilya's help; the goal is to complete all non-landing page redirects by month-end to resolve a 3-month-old issue.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [**Content production is back on track.** The 4 articles/week cadence is stable, and new keyword research for "alternatives" and "therapy for" topics will expand the ketamine cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**The Looker dashboard is temporarily inaccurate.** It will be fixed this week to reflect new URLs, unblocking accurate performance reporting for Innerwell's upcoming monthly update.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [**New development is starting.** Ilya will begin scoping the mental health landing page and indexing page next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

## Topics

### Redirects & Technical Blockers

  - [**Problem:** Old ketamine state availability pages (linked in the footer) need immediate redirection to the new URL structure to fix SEO issues.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Israel is blocked on a technical task requiring Ilya's assistance.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [Ilya was OOO but is now aware of the request.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [One sub-task is complete; the other will take longer.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [**Urgency:** Akina requested all non-landing page redirects be completed by month-end to resolve a 3-month-old issue and allow the team to focus on new content.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Content Production & Strategy

  - [**Cadence:** Stable at 4 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [6 articles were published last week to catch up.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [The workflow is now efficient, with same-day staging and Tuesday publication.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**New Keyword Research:**](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**"Alternatives":** 50+ keywords identified for comparison pages (e.g., "ketamine vs. TMS").](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
          - [**Action:** Prioritize high-volume competitors first.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
          - [**Note:** Content will require calibration with Akina to ensure brand messaging is correct.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**"Therapy for":** New list of low-volume, high-intent keywords identified.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
          - [**Action:** Dedupe against existing articles (e.g., "Ketamine Therapy for Veterans").](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Content Refresh Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Current Focus:** Publish new content to build cluster authority.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [**Future Plan:** Once the cluster is built, analyze performance to refresh underperforming articles and improve internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Reporting & Development

  - [**Looker Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Status:** Inaccurate due to URL changes from redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [**Action:** Matt will fix it this week to unblock Innerwell's monthly reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [**Mental Health Landing Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Status:** Ilya will add scoping to his sprint and begin work next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Indexing Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [**Status:** Also on Ilya's to-do list for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Fix the Looker dashboard this week.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
      - [Create and share "alternatives" and "therapy for" assignments with Akina.](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**Akina:**](https://fathom.video/share/GguyotJ4EDmgrsDgyF45FTyFyAZexyz2?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
